creator: alisson.fg.si@gmail.com
text:
Hi..

in a new installation of freebsd 8.2 (amd64)

if the machine doesn't have a PS2 port to use keyboard... and have only USB port its impossible to use an keyboard on mountroot prompt and to mount the partitions.

it shows the message "ukbd: unable to set the command byte"

How-To-Repeat: change the positions of hard drives... and goes to mountroot prompt
